assertions.assertion: Sets EncryptAssertions = true on the SamlServiceProvider
assertions.rationale: EncryptAssertions = true is set in the SamlServiceProvider configuration.

assertions.assertion: Populates EncryptionCertificates with a certificate loaded from certs/sp-encryption.cer
Sets AllowIdpInitiated = true on the SamlServiceProvider
assertions.rationale: AllowIdpInitiated = true is set on the SamlServiceProvider.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that the IdP-initiated SSO endpoint must be enabled via options.Endpoints.EnableSamlIdpInitiatedSsoEndpoint = true
assertions.rationale: Explicitly shows options.Endpoints.EnableSamlIdpInitiatedSsoEndpoint = true and notes it's disabled by default.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT set EncryptAssertions = true without providing EncryptionCertificates
assertions.rationale: Always provides EncryptionCertificates alongside EncryptAssertions = true.
